name: Spinach & Feta Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Defrost spinach overnight in the refrigerator or microwave, but do not cook. Wrap it in a dish towel or piece of clean old sheeting and tighten the fabric around the spinach to squeeze out all the liquid.
2. Bring all ingredients to room temperature and pour into the bread machine in order. Set "baking control" at 10 o'clock. Select "white bread" and push Start.
3. The green spinach running through this bread makes it look like marble. The loaf is moist yet dense and fragrant with nutmeg and cheese.
4. Meat loaf or cold lamb make excellent sandwich fillings, or eat slices with chicken, egg-lemon, or beef and barley soup.
5. In hot & humid weather, use 1/8 cup less water.
